title: Color observation question about the evangelions
display_title: Color observation question about the evangelions
wikitext:
[]: Color observation question about the evangelions             Quote Post by felix_the_cat » Sat Mar 28, 2009 1:22 am My friend pointed out to me how unit 00 gets the color change from orange to blue after episode 6. I realized when he said this that blue is the inverse of orange. what do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 28, 2009 1:35 am The significance of "complementary colors" probably has more to do with Eva-00's originally planned color scheme, which used both orange and light blue (and was later recycled for Rebuild). Why use complementary colors? Well... these two look good together. And the blue goes with Rei. I don't know the story regarding why/how Eva-00's original color scheme was conceptually "split in two", with the idea of Eva-00 starting out orange and being repainted blue when she gets 'upgraded' later. I might have some stuff that addresses it, but it's not translated.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Mar 28, 2009 8:05 am A couple years back the Eva Monkey proposed a well thought-out theory, but that went into the abyss when trivial being was reborn. I wonder what it said, but I can't remember any of it.

[]:             Quote Post by felix_the_cat » Sat Mar 28, 2009 11:49 am lol well thats too bad oedipusfoot...XD @reichu - damn....its times like these I wish I knew japaneese. but I just dont have the discipline to learn a second language! :P well thanks for the input anyways...haha.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 28, 2009 12:00 pm So the rebuild look of 00 is actually what was intended? I approve... looks much better now. If only they would have dropped the random orange bits on 01 in favor of the original scheme as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 28, 2009 12:06 pm NemZ wrote: So the rebuild look of 00 is actually what was intended?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 28, 2009 12:50 pm If they really intended to go with complimentary colors, 01 should have yellow highlights and 02 should have green. That said, I think the proposal version 00 was intending to show gray, not blue. ...and why hasn't there been an eva whose primary color is green yet? I nominate 04 for a new paint job.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 28, 2009 3:49 pm NemZ wrote: If they really intended to go with complimentary colors, 01 should have yellow highlights and 02 should have green.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sat Mar 28, 2009 4:26 pm Why did they give the Evas such bright colours in the first place? You'd think that being military objects, they'd be more bland-looking, like grey or something.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 28, 2009 4:59 pm Because camouflage (the reason for those subdued colors on military vehicles) is kinda useless at that scale. Also, merchandising!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Mar 28, 2009 7:36 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: A couple years back the Eva Monkey proposed a well thought-out theory, but that went into the abyss when trivial being was reborn. I wonder what it said, but I can't remember any of it.

[]:             Quote Post by felix_the_cat » Mon Mar 30, 2009 4:14 pm hmm I suppose I'll reveal a little of what I think on the color inversion to give the topic life again. I tried to hint in the first post about when the color change occurred. if you recall, Rei and Shinji have a certain exchange after the fight is over and Shinji bails out Rei from the cockpit in episode 6. do any of you recall how their relationship changes after this point? think of this and color inversion, I'd like to see what you guys have to say.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Sun Apr 05, 2009 4:08 pm NemZ wrote: Because camouflage (the reason for those subdued colors on military vehicles) is kinda useless at that scale.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Mon Apr 06, 2009 8:00 am I like unit 01s new colour because the green and orange are fluro and so give it the look of some industrial equipment, as you may see in cities. after all its not ment for camaflage.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Tue Apr 07, 2009 12:05 am Dr. Nick wrote: NemZ wrote: Because camouflage (the reason for those subdued colors on military vehicles) is kinda useless at that scale.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 07, 2009 12:16 am LeoXiao wrote: Why would whoever made the EVAs spend extra money making them purple?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Apr 07, 2009 1:36 am Where do you find these things?!?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 07, 2009 1:52 am ^ The internets, usually. Hanging around imageboards and filter-feeding makes a good start.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Apr 07, 2009 10:35 am NemZ wrote: If they really intended to go with complimentary colors, 01 should have yellow highlights and 02 should have green.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Apr 07, 2009 11:36 am Legendary wrote: Uhm... *sigh* Let's talk color theory.
